rawIntent: Add an isPositive utility under src/shared/utils/is-positive with isPositive(n: number): boolean returning true when n > 0.

successCriteria.description: The isPositive utility function is implemented and returns true for positive numbers and false for zero or negative numbers.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
